---
title: "fill_diagonal"
generated: true
description: "Set the named diagonal of `A` to `fill`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.linalg.matrix`](../nitrix-linalg-matrix.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:fill_diagonal -->
```python
fill_diagonal(A: Num[Array, '... i j'], *, fill: float = 0.0, offset: int = 0) -> Num[Array, '... i j']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:fill_diagonal -->
Set the named diagonal of `A` to `fill`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:fill_diagonal -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `A` | `Num` | `...` × `i` × `j` | — | Matrix block (need not be square). |
| `fill` | `float` | — | `0.0` | Value to write into the diagonal cells. |
| `offset` | `int` | — | `0` | Diagonal offset. `0` is the main diagonal, positive is above, negative is below. |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `...` × `i` × `j`. A copy of `A` with the cells on the named diagonal replaced by `fill` and all other entries unchanged. Diagonal cells that fall outside the matrix are ignored.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:fill_diagonal -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `i` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `j` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
